利申：好鐘意後浪漫時期既音樂 特別rachmaninov 好鐘意佢種抑鬱既感覺 有D似jazz/blues

大家不妨可以share d好聽既音樂

rachmaninoff 比較大路D既音樂

呢兩首應該好易入口

但其實我覺得 Shostakovich最難入口

replies.msg:
+1 Post Romantic 同 20th Century好撚正
最鐘意Rachmaninoff Piano 2,3, Symphony No.2, Paganini Rapsody, Prelude No.3 in c# minor. 佢隻手好撚大
Sibelius Violin Concerto, Symphony no.2, Symphony no.7 好撚正 聽完搞到我好撚想去芬蘭
Richard Strauss 嘅Symphonic Poem”Don Juan”(推薦 Karajan version) “Till Eulenspiegels lustige Streiche”. 仲有Alphine Symphony and Oboe Concerto
Mahler 更加唔洗講. 個人最推薦 Mahler Symphony 2, 4, 5, 8, 9. 特別係2同8, Mahler 2 聽到最尾復活真係爽到極點。（強烈推薦Abaddo and Bernstein version)
其實20th Century 都好撚正
Prokofiev Symphony No.1(Classical) No.5, No.7 都好正。Piano Concerto No.2 No.3
仲有Peter and the Wolf 都好過癮
其實Shostakovich都好正
只係佢好多歌都係跟Stalin要求作
所以會有啲好似行軍打仗咁。
想易入口推薦Symphony No.5，比較循規蹈矩，因為啱啱比Stalin公開譴責
但係Shostakovich仲有啲輕鬆調皮嘅風格好過癮
好似Symphony No. 9 同埋用嚟送比佢個仔Maxim Shostakovich嘅生日禮物Piano Concerto No.2
其中Piano Concerto No.2 嘅2nd movement 完全唔似Shostakovich嘅風格，強烈推薦
最後仲有Stavinsky 嘅 Violin Concerto同 Firebird suite .
如果要話我唔識欣賞嘅歌，我諗就係Schoenberg 嘅atonality 同 Serialism. 同埋Stravinsky嘅rite if spring

六月船歌 諗起難兄難弟

https://youtu.be/yApPnB57L40

Baroque 最中意 Goldberg Variations
Romantic 最中意 Ballade No.1（因為羽生 ）

四大小提琴協奏曲入面我最鍾意 mendelssohn果首
Cadenza 果part寫得好靚

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=o1dBg__wsuo&t=704s
salute d'amour

https://youtu.be/VbxgYlcNxE8
《1812 overtune》- Tchaikovsky

唔肯定呢首算唔算古典音樂，但我一見樓主個名就諗起呢首。

尾段開加農炮真係好正好震撼

Bach Brandenburg Concerto 6
First movement 兩部viola 啲互動好正

Liebestraum No. 3 in A-flat major
Franz Liszt 其實呢首都好出名
Baroque 鍾意Bach嘅 French Suites BWV 812-817
